name: bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_real_fire_exact_items_tile_audit_mcw
description: Exact-id fixture items (brazier, 2x4 fuel, charged lighter), normal deploy/drop/wielded-lighter action route, with same-run saved-map metadata gates after brazier deploy, fuel drop, and final fire checkpoint. No raw map fields are injected.

steps.label: save_after_brazier_deploy
steps.expected_visible_fact: The game returns to the map after saving the immediate brazier-deploy checkpoint.
steps.preconditions: place_brazier_east should have deployed a brazier on the tile east of the player.
steps.failure_rule: if the following saved-map audit cannot see f_brazier east of the player, the deploy primitive is red and later fire steps must not count as feature proof

steps.label: audit_saved_target_tile_for_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved target tile east of player contains f_brazier furniture metadata after the deploy step
steps.preconditions: save_after_brazier_deploy wrote a same-run save immediately after the brazier placement action.
steps.next_step_gate: do not run or credit fuel/lighter/fire proof unless this deploy metadata row is green
steps.abort_reason: brazier deploy metadata missing before fuel/lighter/fire steps

steps.label: save_after_fuel_drop
steps.expected_visible_fact: The game returns to the map after saving the immediate fuel-drop checkpoint.
steps.preconditions: drop_exact_2x4_on_brazier should have dropped 2x4 fuel on the current brazier tile.
steps.failure_rule: if the following saved-map audit cannot see f_brazier and 2x4 on the player's current tile, the drop/fuel primitive is red and later fire steps must not count as feature proof

steps.label: audit_saved_current_tile_for_brazier_fuel
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved current tile contains f_brazier furniture and 2x4 fuel metadata after the drop step
steps.preconditions: save_after_fuel_drop wrote a same-run save while the player stands on the brazier/fuel tile.
steps.next_step_gate: do not run or credit lighter/fire proof unless this fuel metadata row is green
steps.abort_reason: brazier/fuel metadata missing before lighter/fire steps

steps.label: audit_saved_target_tile_for_fd_fire
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved target tile east of player contains fd_fire metadata
steps.preconditions: previous step saved the game after the brazier/lighter activity route
steps.next_step_gate: feature proof cannot close unless this metadata row is green
steps.abort_reason: fd_fire target metadata missing at final fire checkpoint

recommended_test_command: python3 tools/openclaw_harness/startup_harness.py probe bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_real_fire_exact_items_tile_audit_mcw (writes deploy/fuel/fd_fire metadata gates; missing required state aborts the remaining chain instead of becoming feature proof)
